description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a dark gabled roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front facade is characterized by large, grid-style windows and a prominent double garage door, adjacent to a spacious wooden deck or patio area. The roof is pitched with two parallel gables separated by a central flat section, giving the structure a contemporary yet functional appearance. The rear of the house mirrors the front in form but lacks the deck and garage, instead presenting a more private, windowed elevation. The side views reveal the depth of the house and the extension of the deck, as well as the clean, minimalist lines of the architecture. The overall aesthetic is sleek and geometric, with an emphasis on symmetry and open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, large grid windows, and a spacious front deck. The exterior features a striking black-and-white color scheme and clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid windows, double garage door, and a wooden deck extending from the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the pitched roof, and the extension of the deck to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical window placement and no deck or garage, emphasizing privacy and simplicity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck extending from the right, with the same roof and wall design as the other side.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a double garage door, large grid windows, and an adjacent wooden deck; minimal overhang and no visible columns or porch.
